$comment: WORKED EXAMPLE — copy to docs/sandbox/<flow>/handoff.source.json and edit. This is the SINGLE SOURCE; scripts/build-handoff.mjs generates HANDOFF.md, handoff.html, and handover/*.json from it. Authoring order = output order. See handoff.schema.json for the full field reference.
title: Playground Sign-in
summary: Sign-in journey for the Playground service app: service login → educator select → PIN → room select → hub. Replaces the legacy DCM sign-in. 'Done' = a returning educator can reach the room hub in under four taps, and every error state recovers without a dead end.

screens.name: Service sign-in
screens.purpose: Authenticate the device to a service.
screens.exit: → S2 (educator select) on success; stays with inline error on failure
layout: Hero: teal gradient + starfield + brand 'P' emblem
Titles: 'Sign in' / 'Please sign in to your service'
Sheet: username field → password field → spacer → Sign in button

copy.text: Please sign in to your service

behaviour: Sign in is enabled only when both fields are non-empty.
Tap Sign in → ~1s loading → success routes to S2; failure shows inline e-creds.
a11y: Inputs have visible labels; focus order top→bottom.
Errors announced via role=alert; text contrast ≥4.5:1.

acceptance.text: Sign in is disabled until both fields have content.
acceptance.assert: button[name=signin][disabled] while either field is empty

acceptance.text: Valid credentials advance to S2 after the loading state.
Empty/invalid submit shows inline e-creds without leaving the screen.
acceptance.assert: submit(empty) -> alert#e-creds visible AND route == S1

acceptance.text: Password toggle switches between masked and plain text.

screens.name: Educator select
screens.purpose: Pick the educator signing in to this service.
layout: Scrollable list of educator rows (avatar + name)

copy.text: No educators found for this service.

behaviour: Tapping an educator routes to S3 with that educator in context.
a11y: List rows are buttons with accessible names; ≥44px targets.

acceptance.text: Selecting an educator routes to S3 carrying that educator.
acceptance.assert: tap(educator[i]) -> route == S3 AND ctx.educator == educator[i]

stateMatrix.copy: This app is no longer available.

openQuestions.q: Does the service step need an alt 'passcode instead' affordance (only direction 4 had it)?
Normalise 'Forgot password' link colour to teal text-link, or add an accent-link token?

decisions.rationale: Brand moment at sign-in; tested best with educators.
